title: TeamUp Blog
description: TeamUp updates, announcements, and articles about technology, remote work, and design.

home.title: Changing the way people work.
home.description: Stories from the TeamUp team about product thinking, remote work, design, engineering, and company updates.

blogIndex.metaDescription: Browse every TeamUp post and search the archive.
blogIndex.title: TeamUp archive
blogIndex.description: Search posts by title, category, or description without needing a backend.

categoriesPage.metaDescription: Browse all categories from the TeamUp archive.
categoriesPage.title: Browse the content by category
categoriesPage.description: Categories make the archive easy to scan and keep related posts grouped together.
categoriesPage.detailDescription: All posts grouped under this category.
categoriesPage.emptyMessage: No posts were found for this category.

tagsPage.metaDescription: Browse all tags from the TeamUp archive.
tagsPage.title: Browse the content by tag
tagsPage.description: Tags make it easy to follow topics across categories and spot related posts quickly.
tagsPage.detailDescription: Posts linked by the same topic tag.
tagsPage.emptyMessage: No posts were found for this tag.
